name: Electra Battery Materials Corporation
description: Electra Battery Materials Corporation is a processor of low-carbon, ethically sourced battery materials. The company is focused on building a North American battery materials supply chain, primarily through its refinery complex in Ontario, Canada. Electra's core operations include the production of battery-grade cobalt sulfate and the recycling of lithium-ion battery materials (black mass). By providing a domestic source of critical minerals, Electra supports the electric vehicle industry's transition toward sustainable and localized supply chains, reducing reliance on foreign processing and enhancing the security of the North American battery ecosystem.
